Petition To Correct Scrivner'S Errors In Trust Agreement And To Confirm Distribution Of Undistributed Share.
Off Calendar Jan-14-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lillian Ng for Maria Butticci (Successor Trustee).

Ms. Ng stated that the Heirs of Salvatore and Rose were the same People listed in the trust and that all parties had consented except for Melissa Kelly who was a Grand Niece and not an heir at law. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Clauzel.
